{
	.local .align 16 .b8 	__local_depot0[256];
	.reg .b64 	%SP;
	.reg .b64 	%SPL;
	.reg .pred 	%p<160>;
	.reg .b16 	%rs<4>;
	.reg .f32 	%f<1244>;
	.reg .b32 	%r<56>;
	.reg .f64 	%fd<11>;
	.reg .b64 	%rd<527>;


	mov.u64 	%SPL, __local_depot0;
	ld.param.u64 	%rd155, [_ZN6cudapy3src13render_kernel13render_kernelB2v7B112cw51cXTLSUwv1sCUt9Ww0FGw1NRRQPKiLTj0gAEF9aQtui_2br1UFS6rVAbehxbgtKfxBhSPJCEkBNMjAJJC__param_4];

	ld.param.u64 	%rd156, [_ZN6cudapy3src13render_kernel13render_kernelB2v7B112cw51cXTLSUwv1sCUt9Ww0FGw1NRRQPKiLTj0gAEF9aQtui_2br1UFS6rVAbehxbgtKfxBhSPJCEkBNMjAJJC__param_15];
